caption: A man with glasses wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic and a lanyard stands at a podium during a presentation. He is positioned in front of a white wall and a computer monitor. Behind him, a projection screen displays the title "License compliance in Open Source business" and the name "Matthew Garrett." The screen also features the "Brisbane 2011" logo, the URL "Linux.conf.au," and a list of "SPONSORS" including logos for "hp," "IBM," "intel," and "Google." In the initial moment, the man is not visible in the top portion of the scene, but he soon appears as a ghostly reflection or overlay on the projection screen. He remains standing still, looking slightly to his left, with his hands at his sides. On the table in front of him are a water bottle and a microphone.
